superseded_evidence.reason: The original reports contained an author-specific absolute path and were not bound to EVAS 0.8.2 Rust per-case logs. They are not used for acceptance.

review_repairs.repair: Preserve the strict helper implementation on main and add only the non-conflicting interval and event-sampling primitives required by this batch.
Sample immediately around observed mode crossings so affine trace resampling does not create a false discontinuity.
Require the persistent post-period transition after 80-120 pre-switch cycles; the prior early/late averages allowed the late-switch mutation to survive.

reference_and_mutations.runtime_identity: every case log contains Version 0.8.2 and evas_engine = evas-rust

metamorphic.not_applicable_reason: The two decks have no suppressible PWL or PULSE input source.
metamorphic.runtime_identity: every executed case log contains Version 0.8.2 and evas_engine = evas-rust

spectre.reason: The repository owner confirmed that this project does not have or require Spectre for this repair campaign.
spectre.policy: Do not claim or substitute Spectre evidence; acceptance uses Rust EVAS2.
